calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Brandt L. Wolking, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NAVIGATORS SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY, A NEW YOUR CORPORATION.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) DESERT COMMERCIAL CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION A DISSOLVED CORPORATION and DESERT COMMERCIAL CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION, dba DESERT COMMERCIAL CONCRETE a Business Organization form unknown.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 50 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that judgment shall be entered pursuant to CCP 585(a) in favor of NAVIGATORS SPECIALTY INSURANCE COMPANY, a New York Corporation and against Defendants DESERT COMMERCIAL CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION, a dissolved corporation, and DESERT COMMERCIAL CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION, dba DESERT COMMERCIAL CONCRETE a business organization from unknown, reforming Policy No. SF07CGL008081-00, effective May 1, 2007 through May 1, 2008, to contain the Prior Completed or Abandoned Work endorsement, NSIC form designation ANF-ES 164 (07/05)
The reformatin of the Policy is effective as the date of entry of tis Order.
IT IS SO ORDERED.
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Continued To Nov-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
